subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Open the gates of the Kingdom of Thy mercy unto the faces of Thy loved ones, and expand the breasts of Thy faithful servants through the manifestation of Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب افتح ابواب ملکوت رحمتک علی وجوه احبائک و اشرح صدور اودائک بظهور آثار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @naming of children; of individuals, @love of God
